metadata.file_name: Bee Gees - Night Fever (From Saturday Night Fever Soundtrack).flac
metadata.title: Night Fever (From "Saturday Night Fever" Soundtrack)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.94] Listen to the ground
[00:20.50] There is movement all around
[00:22.78] There is something goin' down
[00:24.94] And I can feel it
[00:27.29] On the waves of the air
[00:29.43] There is dancin' out there
[00:31.68] If it's somethin' we can share
[00:33.71] We can steal it
[00:36.06] And that sweet city woman, she moves through the light
[00:40.75] Controlling my mind and my soul
[00:44.76] When you reach out for me, yeah, and the feelin' is right
[00:49.12] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[00:53.05] We know how to do it
[00:57.93] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[01:01.72] We know how to show it
[01:05.27] 
[01:07.35] Here I am
[01:09.41] Prayin' for this moment to last
[01:13.80] Livin' on the music so fine
[01:17.01] Borne on the wind, makin' it mine
[01:25.82] Night fever, night fever
[01:28.23] We know how to do it
[01:33.29] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[01:36.98] We know how to show it
[01:42.17] In the heat of our love, don't need no help for us to make it
[01:46.35] Gimme just enough to take us to the mornin'
[01:50.60] I got fire in my mind, I get higher in my walkin'
[01:55.23] And I'm glowin' in the dark, give you warnin'
[01:58.24] And that sweet city woman, she moves through the light
[02:03.96] Controlling my mind and my soul
[02:06.99] When you reach out for me, yeah, and the feelin' is right
[02:13.28] That night fever, night fever
[02:16.50] We know how to do it (feel like forever, baby, don't you lose it)
[02:21.50] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[02:25.36] We know how to show it
[02:30.74] Here I am
[02:33.09] Prayin' for this moment to last
[02:37.29] Livin' on the music so fine
[02:40.63] Borne on the wind, makin' it mine
[02:48.20] Night fever, night fever
[02:51.46] We know how to do it (feel like forever, baby, don't you lose it)
[02:56.39] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[03:00.27] We know how to show it (I'll leave you never, baby, don't you know it?)
[03:05.29] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[03:08.94] We know how to do it (feel like forever, baby, don't you lose it)
[03:14.00] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[03:17.62] We know how to show it (I'll leave you never, baby, don't you know it?)
[03:22.19] Gimme that night fever, night fever
[03:26.81] We know how to do it (feel like forever)
[03:28.42]
